messages.session_not_found:
❌ No session found for: `{query}`

Use /sessions to see available ones.
messages.session_selected:
✅ *Session selected*

🆔 `{short_id}`
💬 _{title}_
🕐 {age}{dir_note}

Next message will continue this session.
messages.task_started:
⏳ Running in background...
📁 `{workdir}`

I'll notify you when it's done.
messages.no_tasks: ℹ️ No running tasks to cancel.
messages.file_too_large: ❌ `{name}` is too large ({size} MB, limit {limit} MB).
messages.zip_too_large:
❌ ZIP too large ({size} MB, limit {limit} MB).
Try a more specific glob.
messages.no_usage_data: ℹ️ No usage data available. Send a message to Claude first.
messages.no_previous_interaction: ℹ️ No previous interaction yet. Send a message to Claude first.
messages.shutdown_msg:
🔴 Shutting down bot and watchdog. PC can now sleep.
Bot will restart at next login/wake.
messages.shutdown_restart:
🔴 Shutting down. PC can now sleep.
⏰ Scheduled wake + restart in {mins} min ({seconds}s).
messages.restart_needs_number: ❌ Restart needs a number of seconds.
messages.unknown_command:
❓ Unknown command `{cmd}`.

Type /help to see available commands.
messages.safety_modify_prompt:
✏️ Original transcript:
`{text}`

Send the corrected text as your next message.
messages.bg_not_running:
ℹ️ No inline execution is currently running.

Send a prompt first, then use /bg while Claude is processing.
messages.bg_moved:
🔀 *Moved to background — Task #{task_id}*

💬 _{preview}_
📁 `{workdir}`

You'll get a notification when Claude is done.
• /tasks — check status
• /cancel {task_id} — abort
messages.fg_no_output: ℹ️ Task #{task_id} finished ({status}) with no output.
